## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (no warnings)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tests added/updated for any behavior change
- [ ] No locked-decision violations (no framework, no server/Cloud Functions, no accounts — see [claude.md](../claude.md))
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
- [ ] All game-state writes go through `runTransaction` (no raw `setDoc`/`updateDoc`)
- [ ] Screenshots/GIF included for UI changes (if applicable)
